article_title: Bylaw 14757 — Housing Agreement (4281 Grange Street) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Housing Agreement locks 4281 Grange Street units as non-market rental in perpetuity
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council adopted Bylaw 14757 on August 26, 2025, authorising a housing agreement with Qualex-Landmark Orchard Holdings Ltd. that legally binds inclusionary rental units at 4281 Grange Street to non-market tenure and income-based tenant eligibility.
briefs.action_required: Developers and property managers at 4281 Grange Street must ensure all Required Inclusionary Units are rented only to Eligible Tenants per HIL income limits.
briefs.article_title: Bylaw 14757 — Housing Agreement (4281 Grange Street) Bylaw 2025
